image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy background, bold red label 'WRONG QUESTION' with X icon, large text 'Prime or Sub?' in faded gray, three 2-word labels in red: 'Cold Pitch', 'Any Agreement', 'Wait Indefinitely'. Right panel white/light background, bold green label 'RIGHT QUESTION' with checkmark icon, large text 'What do I fill?' in bold dark, three 2-word labels in green: 'Target Certs', 'Negotiate Scope', 'Build Then Prime'. Center: illustrated professional woman in suit walking confidently from dark left panel to bright right panel. Bold headline top: 'WRONG QUESTION. RIGHT MOVE.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
